audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 405 and 413-415 directly enforce the property: `isStale = updatedAt < minTimestamp` (where `minTimestamp = block.timestamp - feedInfo.stalenessThreshold`), followed by `if (withValidation) { if (isStale) { revert StaleFeedData(); } }`. There is no early return or bypass before this check; all `withValidation=true` callers (bid L429, performUpkeep L315/342, GPV2CompatibleAuction L153) reach the guard unconditionally. The data-feed fallback updates `updatedAt` to the most recent available timestamp but cannot make a stale feed appear fresh.
